cron.name: HL Strategy Lab — Weekly Deep Eval
🛡️ Circuit Breaker Monitor
cron.script:
cd /Users/mojoai/Projects/hl-strategy-lab && python3 -c "
import json
from circuit_breaker import run_check
state, metrics = run_check()
level = state.get('level', 'safe')
if level in ('reduce', 'kill'):
    print(f'⚠️ CIRCUIT BREAKER: {level.upper()}')
    print(f'Reason: {state.get(\"reason\", \"unknown\")}')
    print(f'Drawdown: {metrics[\"drawdown_pct\"]:.2f}%')
    print(f'Equity: \${metrics[\"equity\"]:.2f}')
    if level == 'kill':
        print('🛑 ALL TRADING STOPPED — Manual reset required')
# Silent on safe/warning
"
